rule_metadata.author: frack113
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Execution of InstallUtil Without Log

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Execution of InstallUtil Without Log
id: d042284c-a296-4988-9be5-f424fadcc28c
status: test
description: Uses the .NET InstallUtil.exe application in order to execute image without
  log
references:
- https://securelist.com/moonbounce-the-dark-side-of-uefi-firmware/105468/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/framework/tools/installutil-exe-installer-tool
author: frack113
date: 2022-01-23
modified: 2022-02-04
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \InstallUtil.exe
    Image|contains: Microsoft.NET\Framework
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - '/logfile= '
    - /LogToConsole=false
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
